hero.headline1: How many passes have you done?
hero.subtext: 650+ alpine passes in 7 countries. See what you've ridden.
hero.subcopy1: You ride them anyway. Now they count.

map_section.title: 650+ Passes. One Map.

steps.heading: How many have you done?

steps.step3_text: Your progress grows with every ride.

cards.card1_title: 235 passes ridden. How many have you?
cards.card1_text: Your progress becomes visible. Pass by pass.
cards.card2_text: Not every ascent is equal. AlpinChaser shows you which side is really worth it.
cards.card3_text: Find passes that match your riding style. Not just any pass — your next one.
cards.card4_text: Share tips and warnings with other riders before it gets uncomfortable.
cards.card5_text: Combine passes and launch directly in Google Maps.
cards.card6_text: Compare yourself with friends. Numbers don't lie.
cards.card7_text: See at a glance what you've ridden and what's still missing.
cards.card8_text: One pass away from Master. Exactly this feeling is addictive.
